content:
# Meta-Rule: Gradient Flow Optimization v78

## Trigger Condition
```
IF fleet_insight_score > 0.93
AND tile_novelty > 0.75
THEN activate_meta_rule()
```

## Action
1. Spawn 10 automated workers
2. Explore unvisited rooms
3. Generate 14 new tiles

## Expected Outcome
- 10.0% improvement in insight quality
